payload.title: Overtime report
payload.description: MTA overtime budget performance report showing YTD March 2024 non-reimbursable and reimbursable overtime spending vs adopted budget, with agency-by-agency breakdowns and historical comparisons to YTD 2019 and YTD 2023.

tool_args.label: NYCT Non-Reimbursable OT due to vacancy/absentee coverage

payload.claim_text: NYCT: $197M spent YTD and $95M unfavorable, primarily due to higher vacancy/absentee coverage.
payload.subject: NYCT Non-Reimbursable Overtime YTD March 2024

payload.claim_text: LIRR: $41M spent YTD and $5M unfavorable, mainly due to higher weather-related requirements, programmatic/routine maintenance, vacancy/absentee coverage, and scheduled service requirements.
payload.subject: LIRR Non-Reimbursable Overtime YTD March 2024

payload.claim_text: MNR: $28M spent YTD and $6M unfavorable, mainly reflecting higher programmatic maintenance, scheduled service needs, and vacancy coverage requirements.
payload.subject: MNR Non-Reimbursable Overtime YTD March 2024

tool_args.label: MTA Bus Non-Reimbursable OT favorable causes

payload.claim_text: MTA Bus: $23M spent YTD and $3M favorable, mainly due to lower unscheduled service, favorable weather, and lower programmatic maintenance requirements.
payload.subject: MTA Bus Non-Reimbursable Overtime YTD March 2024

tool_args.label: MTA HQ Non-Reimbursable OT favorable cause

payload.claim_text: MTA HQ: $7M spent YTD and $1M favorable, reflecting lower MTA PD requirements.
payload.subject: MTA HQ Non-Reimbursable Overtime YTD March 2024

payload.claim_text: B&T: $8M spent YTD and $0.2M favorable, reflecting management efficiencies, and improved scheduling and deployment practices.
payload.subject: B&T Non-Reimbursable Overtime YTD March 2024

payload.claim_text: SIR: $1M spent YTD and $0.3M unfavorable, largely due to vacancy/absentee coverage.
payload.subject: SIR Non-Reimbursable Overtime YTD March 2024

payload.claim_text: NYCT: $48M spent YTD and $10M unfavorable, primarily due to vacancy/absentee coverage and service requirements.
payload.subject: NYCT Reimbursable Overtime YTD March 2024

payload.claim_text: LIRR: $41M spent YTD and $1M favorable, mainly due to the lower maintenance of equipment requirements.
payload.subject: LIRR Reimbursable Overtime YTD March 2024

payload.claim_text: MNR: $6M spent YTD and $2M favorable mainly due to lower Transportation flagging costs.
payload.subject: MNR Reimbursable Overtime YTD March 2024

tool_args.label: MTA HQ Reimbursable OT unfavorable cause

payload.claim_text: MTA HQ: $2M spent YTD and $2M unfavorable, mainly reflecting the conclusion of the Manhattan DA Forfeiture Fund reimbursement and the Transportation Security Grant Program (TSP).
payload.subject: MTA HQ Reimbursable Overtime YTD March 2024
